evidence_summary: Demonstrate the superhuman physical capabilities of john_carter through high-velocity aerial combat. The sequence must emphasize the scale of the Martian atmosphere and the kinetic energy of mid-air interception to establish Carter as a dominant force in Zo...

While on a solo flight, Carter witnesses three Green Warriors attacking a Zodangan air scout (a relative of the Jeddak). Carter intervenes in the aerial combat, killing the warriors and saving the scout.
john_carter flying solo, observing the distant skirmish.
john_carter hovering near a rescued, damaged scout.
Carter intercepts and eliminates three attackers to save a relative of the Jeddak.
